basic_details.job_title: AIIMS Delhi – Senior Research Fellow and Administrative Assistant – 2 Posts
basic_details.short_information: AIIMS Delhi Recruitment 2026 notification released for Senior Research Fellow and Administrative Assistant posts. Eligible candidates can apply via email on or before 21 June 2026. Check qualification, age limit, salary, and application details.

age_limit.age_details: Max 35 years for Senior Research Fellow, Max 45 years for Administrative Assistant.

qualification.education_qualification: Postgraduate degree in Basic Science or Graduate/Post Graduate Degree in a professional course selected through National Eligibility Tests (CSIR-UGC, NET, GATE) or through national level examinations. 2 years of research experience required. For Administrative Assistant, Master in Scientific discipline.

how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for AIIMS Delhi Various Posts Recruitment 2026 via email should follow the steps below.
seo_tags: AIIMS Delhi Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online for Senior Research Fellow and Administrative Assistant Posts
